scripts.setup:env: test -f apps/backend/.env || cp apps/backend/.env.example apps/backend/.env; test -f apps/frontend/.env.local || cp apps/frontend/.env.local.example apps/frontend/.env.local
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:backend
